title: To -----
content:
Tell me all that thou knowest, and I will thankfully hear it!
    But wouldst thou give me thyself, let me, my friend, be excused!
meaning:
Friedrich Schiller's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To -----"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
